_doc: Maintainable list of special-styled chapter blocks that have NO self-evident markup. Keys are chapter numbers; each entry tags the paragraph run from `from`..`to` (inclusive) with a CSS class family `<type>`/`<type>-top`/`<type>-bot`, styled in assets/css/main.css. Anchors match a paragraph's PLAIN TEXT (tags + entities decoded), smallest valid span wins. `node devScripts/import-gdoc.mjs` re-validates anchors after an import and warns on misses. Most special blocks are AUTO-detected and need NO entry here: lore/system boxes (5+ ===/--- delimited), `[ ... ]` system messages (+ italic = announcement), business `card` (━━━ delimited), `terminal` (₩/※ shop runs), `options` (numbered lists), `panel` (MIN MAX gauge). Only list types with no reliable signal: idcard, chat, note, voice (spaced-caps mascot/system voice, e.g. `G O O D B O Y`), scroll (in-world invitation/manual text framed by `+++` in the source). A box delimiter shorter than the auto threshold (e.g. a `===` User-Guide box) is also listed by its content lines. Lone box-edge glyph lines (`+++`, `===`) framing a listed block are auto-hidden by enhance.mjs. NOTE: a listed entry styles ONE span (smallest from..to), and each entry claims the next not-yet-tagged match; a line that repeats identically in a chapter (e.g. `G O O D B O Y`) is tagged once PER listed entry, so list it N times to style all N occurrences.

1.from: -Is it true Kim Soleum turned down a girl he liked because he was too scared to watch the horror movie she wanted to see?

4.to: : Congratulations. You have been officially hired by Daydream Corporation's Field Exploration team.

14.from: -Did you guys see the official notice that just went up?
14.to: -Is Kim Soleum the one who wore that weird mask with horns…?

20.to: Later, plush dolls made by recycling the clothing and bones of said individuals were discovered in the souvenir shop. (Presumed deceased)

22.from: Cheerful Theme Park User Guide (Applicable up to Exploration Record No. 64)

30.to: -Occult geek, please come out of your own world view. What the hell is a Disaster Management Bureau Waveform

31.from: We would like to express our gratitude to the customers who have purchased Snow White Apples.
31.to: ※This orchard does not take responsibility for any changes that occur to the Body during Death-like Sleep.

40.to: You are currently viewing the manual document summarizing the existing visitors to our exhibition.

40.from: Before reading the following content, we would like to inform you that you have been invited to a very wonderful exhibition.
40.to: Before reading the following content, we would like to inform you that you have been invited to a very wonderful exhibition.

40.from: To ensure your journey is not cumbersome, from now on, you will arrive at the exhibition no matter where you head.
40.to: To ensure your journey is not cumbersome, from now on, you will arrive at the exhibition no matter where you head.

40.from: We will guide you through the common reviews of nine visitors to this exhibition, tentatively collected by Daydream Inc.
40.to: Anyone can stop their viewing and exit whenever they wish.

41.from: This exhibition will be held free of charge for one hour, with an open heart that admires art.
41.to: This exhibition will be held free of charge for one hour, with an open heart that admires art.

43.from: This exhibition is held free of charge for one hour with an open heart that adores art.
43.to: This exhibition is held free of charge for one hour with an open heart that adores art.

80.from: I woke up after sleeping, so why am I at school? (Doodle of a surprised puppy) Preparing for the graduation ceremony? What do you mean, it’s only May?
80.to: I woke up after sleeping, so why am I at school? (Doodle of a surprised puppy) Preparing for the graduation ceremony? What do you mean, it’s only May?

81.to: Graduates only. Please knock before entering.

87.from: Confirmed an advertisement flyer for a new product launch in Qterw-C-1603.
87.to: Request confirmation of employees with similar mask shapes.

103.to: This disciplinary measure is intended to improve the individual's work attitude. Please ensure that similar incidents do not occur in the future.

104.to: But don't worry too much. If you just read these sweet tips I’ve written down, you’ll be able to finish and get out without much trouble.

111.from: The Paradise Test (tentative name) is a phenomenon that occurs very rarely on the Iksan-bound high-speed railway departing from Seoul.
111.to: No casualties to date. Disaster classification pending.

129.to: (Please take the Doorplate back with you!)

136.to: The Agent’s recorder was later found in the electronics department on the 3rd floor of Lookie Mart.

148.from: Assistant Manager ■■■: Yes! I found it. That machine, it’s old, but it looked like it could still function normally. There seemed to be Dream Essence Liquid and certain secret information related to the Darkness as well. Fearing it might fall into the hands of outsiders, I quickly… Yes?
148.to: Assistant Manager ■■■: ……That facility doesn't belong to our company? …Don't tell me it looked like that not because it was contaminated by the Darkness, but because the company…… W-Wait. Why are you holding that and coming toward me….

165.from: -Hongrim Unni, I really, really love you

169.from: -The King of Destruction rookie is adjusting smoothly ^^

172.from: < Flower Golden Resort is a space for happiness. Please refrain from anything that makes other guests or staff uncomfortable.

173.to: We hope you enjoy all the cheerfulness of this resort.

186.to: Additional Special Note 2) Many of the exploration staff who returned on the 6th day testified to working as theme park employees. They claimed to have received items from the gift shop as wages.

188.to: The item that appeared when the Sergeant defeated the Imitator I encountered while cleaning in the company basement after receiving disciplinary action.

190.from: [Don't say anything unnecessary even if the King of Destruction rookie carries a doll keychain, it's a precious friend.]
190.to: [I'm the person who asked today if a younger sibling gave him that doll. If you're reading this, I'm sorry. Agent. ㅠㅠ]

206.from: Any tips for drinking the Wish Ticket?
206.to: —From the advice of an assistant manager in Elite Squad C-Team.

271.to: The Darkness was left unobserved. Upon visiting 7 weeks later, it had automatically repaired itself and was operational again.

274.from: Indulge in an even more distant memory!

276.from: The escalator at Exit 2 is under construction. Please use another exit.
276.to: Owner of lost cat wallet, please go to the station office

285.to: -Depending on the outcome of this urgent situation, rumors are spreading that the suspended registration of the 'Golden Flower Mascot' as a supernatural being may be resumed.

310.from: Something urgent came up that I need to check, so I'm going to the company for a bit.
310.to: I've sent company researchers to Afternoon Station for the details, so you can hear about it when you meet them.

321.to: Records of the patient appearing in said hospital room are below.

322.to: Unconfirmed testimony that these entities made remarks as if celebrating or commemorating something.

Confirmed to be an anomalous phenomenon caused by the absence of a terrace-like space that was originally on the 2nd-floor cafeteria of the sanatorium. The reenactment of the camcorder footage proceeded normally.
※Access is prohibited for the supervising researchers and Field Investigation Team members. Please access this exploration record after receiving permission from the Guard Team.
